recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-1731, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in BeyondTrust's Bomgar RMM, is being actively exploited to deploy ransomware and compromise IT service providers in global supply chain attacks.
Apple removed 45 malicious cryptocurrency apps from its App Store after they stole recovery phrases and private keys from users, mimicking legitimate wallets like MetaMask and Coinbase.
A critical vulnerability in the Flowise AI platform and other frameworks using Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables remote code execution.
